title: SlimePack
description: My personal vanilla modpack, filled with MY favorite client-side mods, that I like, not you, don't complain!
body:
![](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/9wFEA5Ye/images/6772292f92face38989199f2f3ff03f9adf2a2b2.png)

This modpack is MY personal preference in client side mods, works on ANY server, has NO mods that would give you a competitive advantage, everything here is purely visuals!

this pack is filled with performance mods such as [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris), [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling), and much much more!

Its also got all of MY personal favorite client side visuals mods, like [Detail Armor Bar](https://modrinth.com/mod/detail-armor-bar), [Wavey Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/detail-armor-bar), [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip), [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers), and much more!


### NEW: 
Browse Modrinth and Curseforge modpacks with [Resourcify!](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourcify)

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wjSO34OI/images/150c5b2260c6f2394555e15d4f3c63d6e5f2f2c5.png)

Start a multiplayer game and join friends from anywhere with [Essential!](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/HhL7E8-fcGQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


## I will regularly update this for every release, please note that some version releases may vary in mods due to mods not getting updated! <3
